lines: Umva gusaba kwanjye, Mwuka w'imbaraga  Shyir' ububasha bwawe Mu mutima wanjye. Mwuka Wera,
hishuraibyaha bindimo; Mpesh' ubugingo bushya, ibyaha bimvemo.
Za mu mutima wanjye Mbese, nabaho nte, Ntagufite ng' umbemo?Najya nizera nte ? Mwuka, nyobora neza :Nzajya nkwemerera; Ump' ubugingo bushya N'umutima mwiza.
Ne kongera gutinya iby'Umwanzi mubi, Kuk' ukunda kumfasha,Ukampa kunesha.
Mwuka, nyemez' ibyawe Mu mutima wanjye; Uwuzuz' ubugingo No kunesha byose
